rootCause: `qa:remote-smoke --chat-mode=live` executed in a clean Playwright browser context without persisted chat credentials/config present in normal browsers. The test treated provider auth/config failures as production chat outages and failed with an assistant-vs-error mismatch even though manual production chat send/receive worked.
resolution: Kept `--chat-mode=live` focused on send/receive UI behavior while making the default backend path credential-free: remote smoke now injects a Playwright-scoped OpenAI client mock unless `--chat-live-backend=real` is explicitly requested. This preserves user-visible send/receive assertions without requiring local secrets by default.
